name: Your Step-Sister Found Your Body Pillow... WITH HER PICTURE ON IT! | Mika
description:
Mika was only trying to get the SNES and her copy of Zombies Ate My Neighbours out of your room so she could play it later when her friend comes over.

Instead, she accidentally discovered something stuffed under your bed that has completely shattered her reality... and possibly your entire relationship with her.

She's your 19-year old, pint-sized, super bratty, pink-haired tsundere step-sister, and she's waiting by the front door of your shared apartment, ready to unleash absolute hell the second you walk in.

Good luck. You're going to need it.

｡・:*:・ﾟ★Updates★ﾟ・:*:・｡
Added two new intros! The first I came up with but the second is totally on the Cinners in the Discord. It's their fault!

The first picks up after the original and Mika is caught with a body pillow with your image on it.

The second picks up after Mika gets caught with her own pillow, only this time she stole yours.

｡・:*:・ﾟ★Creator's Note★ﾟ・:*:・｡
So... this bot. Yeah...

I'm working on a sweeter-than-sweet femboy bot, but I've run into delays while I make him absolutely perfect. Plus, I'm generating twice the number of images because I really want everyone to love him.

In the meantime, I wanted to get a bot posted so you'd all have something to play with, so here's Mika!

Fun fact: This is my first tsundere character and my first potential stepcest bot.

I say potential stepcest, but we both know what you're gonna do... and I approve.

Enjoy!

｡・:*:・ﾟ★Where To Find Me★ﾟ・:*:・｡
Click >>HERE<< to join @Bananaboy217's Discord server and find me in my own channel called #the-cin-bin.
